notes: Chunk contains a single event: 10-Q 0001546417-25-000111 (2025-08-07), part 1 of 2 — MD&A: cautionary risk factors, comps/traffic/average-check tables, cost-line attribution, segment performance, non-GAAP reconciliations, start of Liquidity section. Part 2 is handled by another bot.
No fiscal_kpis array in this chunk (KPIs ride on chunk_001 only), so all candidates are event-text grounded.

Brand-level metrics (Outback Steakhouse/Carrabba's/Bonefish Grill/Fleming's comps; Bonefish Grill traffic) coined as separate drivers from the company-wide metric per ontology R9; quotes for brand comp rows are exact table fragments from the comparable-restaurant-sales table.

Skipped as vague/boilerplate/duplicative (15): interest_rate (boilerplate list), seasonality, adverse weather, competitive intensity, brand reputation/social media, sustainability reporting compliance, regulatory compliance, leverage/covenants, gift card breakage, sales-side product mix/discounts, supplier concentration, share dilution/warrants, discontinued operations bucket, noncontrolling interests, generic 'inflation' (kept the specific commodity_inflation and wage_rate_inflation instead).
